goal: 为 CXS 创建可安装导向的网站

summary.title: 创建 CXS 安装导向网站
summary.what: 新增独立的 Sites/Vinext 站点目录 site/，实现一个中文 CXS 产品页。首屏突出 CXS 名称、npm 全局安装命令、GitHub/npm 链接、真实终端命令预览和本地检索边界，并生成 1200x750 的 public/screenshot.jpeg 作为 Sites preview。
summary.why: 用户要求一个非常简单明了介绍 CXS 的网站，并希望用户看到首屏时就想马上安装使用。独立站点可以服务这个宣传和安装目标，同时不改变根目录 @act0r/cxs CLI 包、npm 发布流程或全局 skill 发布态。
summary.user_goal: 为 CXS 创建可安装导向的网站

decisions.chose: 在 site/ 下创建独立 Vinext/Sites 项目
decisions.rationale: 隔离网站依赖、lockfile、构建产物和 Sites hosting 配置，避免污染根目录 CLI 包和发布流程。
rejected: 把网站代码并入根 package.json
把本地站点改动解释为 CLI 或全局 skill 发布

decisions.chose: 让 CXS 名称、npm install 命令、马上用 CTA 和终端工作流预览同时出现在第一视口
decisions.rationale: 这直接满足用户的安装转化目标，也避免用抽象营销文案替代可执行动作。

decisions.chose: 页面明确呈现 local-first SQLite index、manual sync/no daemon、progressive read ranges、Node 22+ 等真实边界
decisions.rationale: 与 AGENTS.md 和近期 intent int_ebaa42fe 的发布/安装态边界一致，不把 CXS 描述成 GUI、daemon 或实时同步服务。

decisions.chose: 保持 .openai/hosting.json 的 d1/r2 为 null，并移除未使用的 D1/Drizzle starter 脚手架
decisions.rationale: 这是静态安装型产品页，不需要持久化状态；保留未用数据库文件会误导后续维护。

rejected.alternative: 部署前引入更复杂的互动 demo 或 GUI 流程
rejected.reason: 用户要求简单明了和首屏安装冲动，复杂体验会稀释安装命令和产品边界。

rejected.alternative: 使用 Sites connector 失败后继续尝试远端部署循环
rejected.reason: Sites connector 多次在 MCP 初始化握手阶段失败，基本网络 curl 可达但 connector list/create 均不可用；继续循环不会提高本地交付质量。

review_notes: Relevant prior intent int_ebaa42fe was honored by keeping website work separate from CLI npm release and global skill publication state.
Validation completed: npm ci in site/, npm run lint in site/, npm run build in site/, desktop and mobile browser checks, 1200x750 screenshot verification, root npm run check.

Sites deployment was not completed because the Sites connector repeatedly failed during MCP startup against https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/wham/apps; an ignored deploy archive was prepared at .ml-cache/sites/cxs-site-dist.tgz for retry when the connector recovers.

architectural_claims: CXS website is isolated under site/ and does not alter the root CLI package contract.
The site is a Vinext/Sites-compatible Worker app with no D1 or R2 bindings.
The page is content-led and install-focused rather than an application shell.
behavioral_changes: Adds a runnable website at site/ with scripts for dev, build, start, and lint.
Adds CXS-specific metadata, favicon, responsive hero, command workflow sections, and canonical preview screenshot.
Keeps deploy metadata in site/.openai/hosting.json with d1 and r2 set to null.
security_implications: No authentication, secret, or persistence surface was added.
External links point to the public GitHub repository and npm package.
migration_notes: No CLI or database migration is required.
Remote Sites deployment still needs project provisioning once the Sites connector is available.
